Here is the list of astrological signs and their corresponding scores based on various life aspects:
1. Aquarius - 7/10 - Known for their humanitarian nature, Aquarians can be unpredictable and rebellious, but also possess great vision and creativity.
2. Aries - 8.5/10 - Fiery and impulsive, Aries are natural-born leaders with a strong sense of adventure and a willingness to take risks.
3. Taurus - 6.5/10 - Practical and dependable, Tauruses value stability and security, but can also be stubborn and resistant to change.
4. Gemini - 8/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, Geminis are curious and communicative, with a love for learning and socializing.
5. Cancer - 9/10 - Emotionally intelligent and nurturing, Cancers are caring and protective of their loved ones, but can also be moody and clingy.
6. Leo - 7.5/10 - Confident and charismatic, Leos are natural performers who crave attention and admiration, but can also be prideful and dominant.
7. Virgo - 8/10 - Analytical and detail-oriented, Virgos are hardworking and precise, with a strong sense of duty and responsibility.
8. Libra - 9/10 - Diplomatic and social, Librans value harmony and balance, with a strong sense of justice and fairness.
9. Scorpio - 7/10 - Passionate and intense, Scorpios are perceptive and intuitive, but can also be secretive and vengeful.
10. Sagittarius - 8.5/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarians are freedom-loving and philosophical, with a love for exploration and discovery.
11. Capricorn - 6/10 - Disciplined and responsible, Capricorns are ambitious and patient, but can also be rigid and controlling.
12. Pisces - 8.5/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, Pisces are dreamy and artistic, with a strong connection to their intuition and emotions.
